name: GeoNames cities15000
note: zip of cities15000.txt — tab-separated GeoNames dump (col 1 = geonameid, col 2 = name, col 3 = asciiname, col 15 = population). Populated places > 15000 people (~34k rows). The GeoNames dumps regenerate ~daily, so this is intentionally UNPINNED (a fixed sha256 would fail strict verification on every upstream refresh); reproducibility comes from the cached snapshot + --seed.
